findings.title: Zero initialized BrakeHealthCurrent fleet-wide
findings.codeEvidence: brake_health_current WHERE is_initialized=true → 0/6
findings.dataEvidence: VPS PostgreSQL read-only 2026-07-17; 355 trip_driving_impact rows unused by wear model
findings.impact: Wear model never executes; rental health and UI show NO_BASELINE for all vehicles
findings.reproduction: SELECT count(*) FROM brake_health_current WHERE is_initialized
findings.recommendation: Run backfill-brake-health-from-registration-specs --dry-run then supervised --execute

findings.title: Registration reference specs exist but init never applied
findings.codeEvidence: vehicles.service registerFromDimo → initializeFromRegistration; backfill script exists
findings.impact: Fleet has DOCUMENTED spec data but no anchors; DI inputs idle
findings.reproduction: Compare ref_specs count vs brake_health_current count
findings.recommendation: Execute registration backfill for eligible vehicles

findings.title: Trip driving impact computed but brake recalculation produces no state
findings.codeEvidence: DrivingImpactProcessor calls recalculate; recalculate returns null when not initialized
findings.dataEvidence: 356 trips with TDI / 60d; 0 brake_health_current; lastRecalculatedAt absent
findings.impact: Post-trip recalc is no-op; hourly scheduler also iterates zero initialized vehicles
findings.reproduction: Observe recalculate early-return in brake-health.service.ts L661-663
findings.recommendation: Initialize baselines before relying on trip-triggered recalc
requiredTests: integration: init → trip → recalc writes BHC

findings.title: Active DTC not ingested into BrakeEvidence
findings.codeEvidence: No producer VehicleDtcEvent → BrakeEvidence in codebase
findings.dataEvidence: VEHICLE_005: active P0675 WARNING in vehicle_dtc_events; 0 brake_evidence
findings.impact: Canonical safety path blind to live DTC; rental/UI cannot surface DTC-based brake alerts
findings.reproduction: SELECT * FROM vehicle_dtc_events WHERE is_active AND vehicle matches VEHICLE_005 rank
findings.recommendation: Wire DTC poll → BrakeEvidence DTC_SIGNAL with clearance handling

findings.title: BRAKE enrichment jobs stuck PENDING
findings.codeEvidence: vehicles.service creates EnrichmentJobType.BRAKE; no processor found
findings.impact: Registration pipeline signals incomplete brake onboarding
findings.reproduction: SELECT status,count(*) FROM vehicle_enrichment_jobs WHERE job_type='BRAKE' GROUP BY 1
findings.recommendation: Implement processor or remove orphan job type

findings.title: 38.5% completed trips lack TripDrivingImpact rows
findings.codeEvidence: DI queue processes subset of trips; enrichment gaps documented in driving-analysis audit
findings.impact: If initialized, coverage gaps would force rolling-gap fallback for missing km
findings.reproduction: trips WITHOUT matching trip_driving_impact in 60d window
findings.recommendation: Audit trip enrichment orchestrator completion rates before brake go-live

findings.title: TDI distance_km diverges from VehicleTrip.distance_km
findings.codeEvidence: TripDrivingImpact stores own distance_km from DI compute
findings.dataEvidence: 135 joined rows with |tdi.distance - trip.distance| > 0.5 km fleet-wide
findings.impact: Modeled km may disagree with odometer/trip ledger; coverage ratio semantics unclear
findings.reproduction: JOIN trip_driving_impact ON vehicle_trips WHERE abs(delta)>0.5
findings.recommendation: Align TDI distance source with trip finalize distance or document delta

findings.title: VEHICLE_003 lacks reference spec — backfill ineligible
findings.codeEvidence: shouldInitializeBrakesFromRegistration requires spec or NEW
findings.impact: Cannot auto-init from registration backfill; manual service required
findings.recommendation: Manual brake service or spec capture for VEHICLE_003

findings.title: Legacy brakePadPercent null fleet-wide
findings.codeEvidence: buildNoBaselineSummary checks legacy brakePadPercent for WARNING_ONLY
findings.impact: No legacy telemetry fallback path; pure NO_BASELINE UX
findings.recommendation: Do not rely on legacy path; prioritize V2 init

findings.title: Rolling VDI hard-brake metrics zero despite 454 harsh driving events
findings.codeEvidence: getVehicleImpactForBrake reads vehicle_driving_impact_current
findings.dataEvidence: hard_brake_per_100km=0 for all 6 VDI rows; 454 HARSH_ACCELERATION/CORNERING events 60d
findings.impact: Gap-fill wear would under-estimate harsh braking stress if initialized
findings.recommendation: Verify DI scorer inputs from TripBehaviorEvent vs DrivingEvent paths

findings.title: Rolling 30d aggregate would fill historical gaps post-init
findings.codeEvidence: recalculate L809-908 uncoveredDistance uses getVehicleImpactForBrake
findings.dataEvidence: 6 VDI rows present; would apply current rolling to past uncovered km
findings.impact: Historical wear backfill uses present behavior — optimistic/pessimistic bias
findings.recommendation: After init, monitor modeling_source and provenanceWarnings

findings.title: BrakeTripMetric unused
findings.codeEvidence: No read/write in codebase
findings.impact: Architecture misleading; no idempotency layer for trip brake metrics
findings.recommendation: Deprecate schema or implement writer

findings.title: Spec-only anchor can reach HIGH confidence without measurement
findings.codeEvidence: classifyConfidenceLevel + initializeFromRegistration NEW nominal path
findings.dataEvidence: Phase 5 backtest: 0 measurements; 5 SPEC_ONLY reference specs
findings.impact: Operators may trust HIGH confidence on undocumented wear
findings.reproduction: brake-registration-regression NEW without mm → confidence HIGH path
findings.recommendation: Cap confidence for DOCUMENTED-only anchors without mm

findings.title: K-factor calibration not implemented at runtime
findings.codeEvidence: No calibrateFromMeasurement writer; k factors stay 1.0
findings.impact: Prediction error cannot be corrected from workshop measurements
findings.recommendation: Implement calibration after confirmed measurement events

findings.title: hasAlert dual semantics can escalate rental health without warning/critical openAlert
findings.codeEvidence: computeAlerts sets DB hasAlert for info COVERAGE_GAP; composeSummaryDto filters API hasAlert; evaluateBrakes uses summary.hasAlert
findings.dataEvidence: No fleet rows; code path confirmed
findings.impact: GOOD overallCondition + hasAlertOverride (stale DB flag or legacy pad) → rental module warning without canonical openAlert
findings.reproduction: recalculate with modelCoverageRatio<0.6 → DB hasAlert true; API may differ
findings.recommendation: Align hasAlert semantics; add rental-health test for info-alert non-escalation

findings.title: COVERAGE_GAP exists only in legacy computeAlerts not canonical openAlerts
findings.codeEvidence: computeAlerts type COVERAGE_GAP info; buildCanonicalReadModel has no equivalent
findings.impact: API consumers reading openAlerts miss coverage gap; policy G not fully surfaced in canonical layer
findings.reproduction: Compare computeAlerts vs buildCanonicalReadModel alert lists
findings.recommendation: Add BRAKE_COVERAGE_GAP to openAlerts as info severity or remove legacy-only path

findings.title: No Prometheus brake-health metrics registered
findings.codeEvidence: grep brake_recalculation_total / brake_alert_total → no matches; TireHealthObservabilityService exists as contrast
findings.dataEvidence: VPS Prometheus scrapes synqdrive_* but no brake_* counters
findings.impact: Cannot observe recalc failures, duration, blocking events, or trip coverage in Grafana
findings.recommendation: Add BrakeHealthObservabilityService mirroring tire pattern

findings.title: Deprecated GET /brake-status still uses brakePadPercent heuristic
findings.codeEvidence: vehicle-intelligence.controller getBrakeStatus
findings.dataEvidence: fleet brakePadPercent null — endpoint returns watch/good heuristics only
findings.impact: Legacy API consumers could diverge from canonical brake-health/summary
findings.recommendation: Deprecate endpoint or proxy to canonical summary

findings.title: vehicles.service fleet list still exposes brakePadPercent as brakes score
findings.codeEvidence: vehicles.service brakes: state?.brakePadPercent ?? 0
findings.impact: Non-rental fleet surfaces may show 0% brakes unrelated to V2 model
findings.recommendation: Remove or map from canonical summary

findings.title: health-summary remainingKm falls back to legacy.remainingKm
findings.codeEvidence: health-summary.service.ts brakes.remainingKm ?? legacy.remainingKm
findings.impact: Health tab may show legacy km when canonical estimatedReplacementDueInKm null
findings.recommendation: Use canonical range min only

findings.title: ABS_WARNING MEASUREMENT_REQUIRED SPEC_UNCONFIRMED alert codes not implemented for brakes
findings.codeEvidence: brake-status.ts BrakeAlertCode enum lacks these codes
findings.impact: Safety policy H and spec honesty gaps vs audit checklist
findings.recommendation: Define canonical codes or document intentional omission

findings.title: Brake recalculation scheduler has no BullMQ dedupe locks or metrics
findings.codeEvidence: brake-recalculation.scheduler.ts @Interval hourly sequential loop
findings.dataEvidence: 0 initialized vehicles → scheduler no-op; DrivingImpactProcessor fire-and-forget recalc
findings.impact: Race conditions and duplicate recalcs possible at scale; no worker retry observability
findings.reproduction: Compare tire queue pattern vs brake inline scheduler
findings.recommendation: Queue recalcs with per-vehicle lock; emit brake_recalculation_* metrics

findings.title: k-factor calibration not implemented at runtime
findings.codeEvidence: grep calibrateFromMeasurement → no writer in brakes module
findings.impact: Prediction error cannot be corrected from workshop measurements
findings.reproduction: Schema k-factor fields never updated post-init
findings.recommendation: Implement calibrateFromMeasurement after confirmed mm

findings.title: harshBrakeWearMultiplier not wired into recalculate
findings.codeEvidence: harshBrakeWearMultiplier in brake-status.ts only; recalculate uses hardBrakePer100Km steps separately
findings.dataEvidence: VDI hard_brake_per_100km=0 fleet-wide despite harsh driving_events
findings.impact: Harsh braking stress under-modeled in wear path
findings.recommendation: Wire multiplier into pad/disc wear computation

findings.title: No recalculation dedupe or per-vehicle locking
findings.codeEvidence: BrakeRecalculationScheduler sequential; DrivingImpactProcessor fire-and-forget
findings.impact: Concurrent recalcs may race; duplicate work at scale
findings.reproduction: Parallel trip end + hourly scheduler on same vehicle
findings.recommendation: BullMQ per-vehicle lock or dedupe key

findings.title: No per-component identity — four axle scalars only
findings.codeEvidence: BrakeHealthCurrent front/rear pad/disc fields; no component UUID
findings.impact: Partial replacement and component history not trackable
findings.recommendation: Component-level lifecycle model or explicit scope preservation

findings.title: Service scope not passed to initialize — partial service re-inits all
findings.codeEvidence: initializeFromService does not filter by scope[]
findings.impact: Front-pads-only service may reset rear/disc anchors
findings.reproduction: recordBrakeService scope FRONT_PADS only → inspect BHC update
findings.recommendation: Scope-aware anchor mutation

findings.title: Spec-fallback does not fill only replaced components
findings.codeEvidence: initializeFromRegistration sets all four anchors from spec
findings.impact: Spec may overwrite unstated components on partial knowledge
findings.reproduction: Init with spec missing rear values
findings.recommendation: Component-level spec application

findings.title: k-factors and calibrationCount reset on every init
findings.codeEvidence: initialize sets frontPadKFactor=1.0; calibrationCount=0
findings.impact: Calibration history lost on re-service
findings.recommendation: Preserve k-factors unless scope replaces component

findings.title: No wear snapshot history — as-of replay not supported
findings.codeEvidence: BrakeHealthCurrent single row; no fingerprint/version history table
findings.impact: Cannot reproduce historical wear state for audit/backtest
findings.recommendation: Optional snapshot on recalc or event-sourced anchors

findings.title: Rotor width used as disc thickness anchor
findings.codeEvidence: VehicleBrakeReferenceSpec.frontRotorWidth → frontDiscAnchorMm
findings.dataEvidence: VEHICLE_004 front disc spec 36mm width vs ~25mm thickness typical
findings.impact: Disc wear model uses wrong semantic unit — implausible remaining life
findings.reproduction: Compare spec rotor width to workshop disc thickness
findings.recommendation: Separate rotor width from wear depth; require measured disc mm

findings.title: Static EV reku factor — not telematics-measured regeneration
findings.codeEvidence: padRekuFactors.ELECTRIC in brake-health.config.ts
findings.impact: EV pad wear may be over-estimated without measured regen split
findings.recommendation: Do not infer regen split from battery power alone

findings.title: Generic 2mm disc max wear — not OEM-specific minimum thickness
findings.codeEvidence: cfg.disc.maxWearMm = 2.0
findings.impact: Disc critical thresholds may be wrong per vehicle
findings.recommendation: OEM min thickness per model or measured anchor only

findings.title: Set-level 60/40 health average can mask critical axle
findings.codeEvidence: 0.6*min + 0.4*avg axle health aggregation
findings.impact: Overall padsHealthPct may understate worst axle
findings.reproduction: front CRITICAL rear GOOD → blended percent
findings.recommendation: Use min axle for limiting component display

findings.title: DIMO native braking events not ingested for VEHICLE_003
findings.codeEvidence: DIMO GraphQL behavior events vs driving_events table
findings.impact: Harsh brake rate under-counted for wear and insights
findings.recommendation: Fix LTE_R1 behavior event ingestion for V003

findings.title: All chassisBrake* signals DOCUMENTED_NOT_AVAILABLE on LTE_R1 fleet
findings.codeEvidence: 156 DIMO queries; 0/6 availableSignals
findings.impact: No pedal/pressure/ABS telemetry path for brake health
findings.recommendation: Do not plan wear model on DIMO brake sensors for LTE_R1

findings.title: EV regen vs friction split not measurable from battery power alone
findings.codeEvidence: evRegenDuringDecelRate 0.001 on VEHICLE_002
findings.impact: Cannot validate EV brake wear reduction from telematics
findings.recommendation: Keep static reku factor; label as ESTIMATED

findings.title: Harsh-brake multiplier needs event path not pedal signals
findings.codeEvidence: No pedal signals; driving_events exist
findings.impact: Multiplier wiring should use TripBehavior/DrivingEvent not DIMO pedal
findings.recommendation: Wire multiplier to DI harsh brake rate

findings.title: 20 SPEC_ONLY reference rows must not be used as backtest ground truth
findings.codeEvidence: audit-brake-health-backtest.ts exclusion logic
findings.impact: False validation if specs trusted as measurements
findings.recommendation: Maintain SPEC_ONLY exclusion in all GT pipelines

findings.title: Dual alert paths — computeAlerts vs buildCanonicalReadModel.openAlerts
findings.codeEvidence: computeAlerts on recalc; openAlerts on summary read
findings.impact: DB hasAlert and API openAlerts can diverge
findings.reproduction: Compare alert lists after recalc with coverage gap
findings.recommendation: Unify alert pipeline or deprecate computeAlerts

findings.title: BrakeCriticalDetector parallels canonical logic — drift risk
findings.codeEvidence: ~200 LOC duplicate classification in detector vs buildCanonicalReadModel
findings.impact: Insights/notifications may diverge from brake-health summary
findings.reproduction: Compare detector output vs getSummary for same vehicle state
findings.recommendation: Delegate detector to shared buildCanonicalReadModel or brake-status only

findings.title: Confidence score awards points for spec-fallback anchor
findings.codeEvidence: confidence scoring in recalculate includes anchor presence without mm
findings.impact: Inflated confidence on DOCUMENTED-only anchors
findings.reproduction: Init from spec without measurement → confidence score
findings.recommendation: Separate spec presence from measurement freshness points

findings.title: Canonical measured thickness escalation pads-only in axle check
findings.codeEvidence: buildCanonicalReadModel measuredPadMm path; disc measured thickness less prominent
findings.impact: Disc critical from measurement may be under-weighted vs pads
findings.recommendation: Symmetric pad/disc measured thickness handling

findings.title: ClickHouse unreachable — HF mirror and analytics degraded
findings.codeEvidence: CH probe failed during audit; clickhouseStatus unreachable
findings.dataEvidence: VPS audit 2026-07-17; aligns with tire audit
findings.impact: Trip/HF quality signals for DI may be degraded
findings.recommendation: Restore CH before relying on HF-backed DI for brake wear

scopeReplaySummary.note: No BRAKE_SERVICE events in production — scope replay requires post-init fleet

modelPlausibilitySummary.reason: No initialized BrakeHealthCurrent — cannot reproduce wear outputs
